raw.subject: Davenport's D & D Wrecker: Something I noticed about your page
raw.body:
Hi,

You've been sharing some great photos of your fleet on Facebook, and it looks like you've got a lot of experience helping Davenport drivers get back on the road.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which means you might be missing out on bookings and calls from people who want to schedule towing services.

I took a look at your Facebook page and sketched out a simple homepage idea that incorporates your services menu, work gallery, and booking call-to-action. Here's a sneak peek:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/d-d-wrecker-inc-davenport

I'd love to discuss how we could bring this to life with a simple, straightforward project for local businesses like yours.

Let's talk details – reply or give me a quick call to explore options for a flat fee.
